plugins.name: syneidesis
plugins.description: Surface potential gaps at decision points — /gap (συνείδησις: knowing-together)

plugins.name: katalepsis
plugins.description: Verify understanding after AI work through intent-scented entry points — /grasp (κατάληψις: a grasping firmly)

plugins.name: aitesis
plugins.description: Infer context insufficiency before execution — /inquire (αἴτησις: a requesting)

plugins.name: analogia
plugins.description: Validate structural mapping between domains — /ground (ἀναλογία: a proportion)

plugins.name: periagoge
plugins.description: Crystallize in-process abstraction through dialectical triangulation — /induce (περιαγωγή: turning-around)

plugins.name: euporia
plugins.description: Resolve via Extended-Mind reverse induction — /elicit (εὐπορία: way through)

plugins.name: prosoche
plugins.description: Compile slow/threshold execution risks into verifiable goal conditions — /attend (προσοχή: attention)

plugins.name: epharmoge
plugins.description: Detect application-context mismatch after execution — /contextualize (ἐφαρμογή: an application)

plugins.name: elenchus
plugins.description: Vet working context by dialectical antithesis before action — /sublate (ἔλεγχος: cross-examination)

plugins.name: horismos
plugins.description: Define epistemic boundaries per decision — /bound (ὁρισμός: a bounding)

plugins.name: epistemic-cooperative
plugins.description: Utility skills layered on top of the core 14 protocols — /catalog, /onboard, /probe, /report, /dashboard, /introspect, /sophia, /curses, /comment-review, /review-loop, /goal-research, /steer, /realign, /misuse, /triage, /dispatch with post-cycle improvement capture, /forge, /reduced-space-test, /image-companion, and the /white-bear and /zero-shot prose audits. See each skill's SKILL.md for details.

plugins.name: anamnesis
plugins.description: Resolve vague recall into recognized context — /recollect (ἀνάμνησις: recollection)

plugins.name: diylisis
plugins.description: Distill a session-tethered working context into a self-contained portable handoff — /distill (διύλισις: refining/distillation)

plugins.name: hyphegesis
plugins.description: Conduct the method of a session's epistemic work before object-level cognition — /conduct (ὑφήγησις: a leading-the-way)
